response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio consists of live commentary from Ninomae Ina'nis in English, with Himemori Luna's Japanese commentary occasionally audible in the background. No vocal music is present. 2. Timing & Pacing: Strictly aligned with the verbal delivery. Background commentary is separated and accurately translated. 3. Translation Strategy: Spoken English is retained directly in both og and en fields, while Luna's background Japanese is transcribed and translated.

subtitles.original: Right, so I... I will need...
subtitles.english: Right, so I... I will need...

subtitles.original: to breed, for sure.
subtitles.english: to breed, for sure.

subtitles.original: Which means I can get three more bees.
subtitles.english: Which means I can get three more bees.

subtitles.original: Although I technically only need two right now.
subtitles.english: Although I technically only need two right now.

subtitles.original: I'm getting pretty close.
subtitles.english: I'm getting pretty close.

subtitles.original: I have what? 70... 80...
subtitles.english: I have what? 70... 80...

subtitles.original: Let's see. I wonder if there is anything we can sell.
subtitles.english: Let's see. I wonder if there is anything we can sell.

subtitles.original: We shall...
subtitles.english: We shall...

subtitles.original: No, sugarcane doesn't give money.
subtitles.english: No, sugarcane doesn't give money.

subtitles.original: カブ買っとこ、うわ。
subtitles.english: I'll buy some turnips, whoa.

subtitles.original: よし...
subtitles.english: Alright...

subtitles.original: おー。
subtitles.english: Oh.

subtitles.original: あと、もうちょっとだな。
subtitles.english: Just a little bit more.

subtitles.original: Ah! I can sell pumpkin pie!
subtitles.english: Ah! I can sell pumpkin pie!

subtitles.original: Oh! I can sell bees!
subtitles.english: Oh! I can sell bees!

subtitles.original: Oh, Combat Support Bee.
subtitles.english: Oh, Combat Support Bee.

subtitles.original: Ah...
subtitles.english: Ah...

subtitles.original: I can sell pumpkin pie. How do you make pumpkin pie?
subtitles.english: I can sell pumpkin pie. How do you make pumpkin pie?

subtitles.original: I can sell the carrots and wheat. Wait, don't you need wheat to make pumpkin pie?
subtitles.english: I can sell the carrots and wheat. Wait, don't you need wheat to make pumpkin pie?

subtitles.original: I can definitely sell carrots though.
subtitles.english: I can definitely sell carrots though.

subtitles.original: Wait, you know what? I'm gonna make an investment.
subtitles.english: Wait, you know what? I'm gonna make an investment.

subtitles.original: I'm gonna get a shulker box because it's 30k, which will allow me to carry...
subtitles.english: I'm gonna get a shulker box because it's 30k, which will allow me to carry...

subtitles.original: oh, everything.
subtitles.english: oh, everything.

subtitles.original: キー、もうちょっと行く？
subtitles.english: Kee, should we go a bit more?

subtitles.original: Carry all the carrots and sell it. It's an investment.
subtitles.english: Carry all the carrots and sell it. It's an investment.

subtitles.original: マックス、マックス。
subtitles.english: Max, max.

subtitles.original: And hopefully it'll get me something.
subtitles.english: And hopefully it'll get me something.

subtitles.original: That way I can sell a lot more things at once. Mwahahaha.
subtitles.english: That way I can sell a lot more things at once. Mwahahaha.

subtitles.original: Automation is not allowed from what I know.
subtitles.english: Automation is not allowed from what I know.

subtitles.original: Alright.
subtitles.english: Alright.

subtitles.original: We shall move all the carrots.
subtitles.english: We shall move all the carrots.

subtitles.original: That's nice, actually.
subtitles.english: That's nice, actually.

subtitles.original: Let me bring all the carrots from there.
subtitles.english: Let me bring all the carrots from there.

subtitles.original: I think we can place a hopper...
subtitles.english: I think we can place a hopper...

subtitles.original: underneath the bee thing, but not anywhere else? I'm not sure, we'll see.
subtitles.english: underneath the bee thing, but not anywhere else? I'm not sure, we'll see.

subtitles.original: Have the carrots grown?
subtitles.english: Have the carrots grown?

subtitles.original: There's still a few that still need growing.
subtitles.english: There's still a few that still need growing.

subtitles.original: We'll get the pumpkin- ah.
subtitles.english: We'll get the pumpkin- ah.

subtitles.original: We'll at least get the pumpkin while we're here.
subtitles.english: We'll at least get the pumpkin while we're here.

subtitles.original: My slow life plan is coming true.
subtitles.english: My slow life plan is coming true.

subtitles.original: Ah!
subtitles.english: Ah!

subtitles.original: My axe...
subtitles.english: My axe...

subtitles.original: I need to learn how to make pumpkin pie.
subtitles.english: I need to learn how to make pumpkin pie.

subtitles.original: Pumpkin, sugar, egg. I need chickens!
subtitles.english: Pumpkin, sugar, egg. I need chickens!

subtitles.english: Sugar we have plenty of.
